states.name: intake
states.label: agent:drill-me
states.description: Issue is being drilled or clarified.

states.name: shadow
states.label: agent:shadow
states.description: An opt-in analysis-only recommendation is running; source mutation is forbidden.

states.name: queued
states.label: agent:queued
states.description: Implementation slice exists but is not running.

states.name: implementing
states.label: agent:in-progress
states.description: An agent workflow is currently mutating code.

states.name: review
states.label: agent:review
states.description: A PR is awaiting automated review.

states.name: blocked
states.label: agent:blocked
states.description: Automation stopped and needs human action or retry.

states.name: approved
states.label: agent:approved
states.description: Automated review found no blockers; human merge is still required.

states.name: human-merge
states.description: A human reviews and merges the PR.

commands.description: Retry the last blocked or queued agent action.
Remove runnable labels and mark the item blocked.
Add agent:implement to an issue or agent PR.
Add agent:review to an agent PR.
Add agent:update-branch to an agent PR.

issue_created_go_signal: Only agent:drill-me starts intake automatically; implementation requires agent:implement.
